summary: V5 Progress Section, Light Mode, and deepened background fully verified. Backend 9/9 pytest passed. Frontend verified end-to-end in both Game Mode and Focus Mode: Progress tab visible as standalone nav item (5th tab in Game, 2nd in Focus), Progress page renders Daily/Weekly/Monthly toggle (Weekly default), 3 stat cards (Gems/XP/Tasks), 5 chart types (bar/pie/line/area/column) all switchable with recharts SVG rendering. Settings shows Appearance section with Light Mode toggle; icon swaps Moon↔Sun; localStorage['lightMode'] persists; html.light-mode class toggles. --color-bg=#06080F, body bg rgb(6,8,15) — deep dark as specified. Progress section still embedded in Settings and All-Time Stats still present.
passed_tests: Backend login: admin@habitrpg.com, test@habitrpg.com
GET /api/progress/daily returns gems_earned_today, completed_habits, total_habits
GET /api/progress/weekly returns total_gems, total_tasks
GET /api/progress/monthly returns total_gems, total_tasks (new V5 endpoint)
GET /api/progress/monthly without auth returns 401
Game Mode: 5 desktop nav items visible (Home, Progress, Level, Shop, Settings)
Focus Mode: 3 desktop nav items visible (Home, Progress, Settings); Level/Shop hidden
ProgressPage renders at /dashboard/progress with data-testid=progress-page
Range toggles daily/weekly/monthly visible, Weekly active by default
3 stat cards (Gems Earned, XP Earned, Tasks Done) visible
5 chart toolbar buttons (bar/pie/line/area/column) visible
Chart type switching: each renders recharts <svg> element
Range switch to daily/monthly updates stat card values
Settings Appearance section contains Light Mode toggle
Moon icon shown when dark (default), Sun icon shown when lightMode=true
localStorage.lightMode persists correctly ('true' on, 'false' off)
document.documentElement gets 'light-mode' class when toggled on
Progress section still embedded inside Settings (data-testid=progress-section)
All-Time Stats section still present in Settings
--color-bg CSS var = #06080F; body backgroundColor rgb(6,8,15) — deep dark
Focus Mode Progress page renders with all 5 chart types and 3 stat cards
critical_code_review_comments: ProgressPage.js line 48-56: computed fields work correctly by switching between daily shape (gems_earned_today/xp_earned_today/completed_habits) and aggregate shape (total_gems/total_xp/total_tasks). However, daily doesn't expose a 'xp_earned_today' field — only gems_earned_today per /api/progress/daily response — so XP Earned on Daily may always read 0 unless backend adds xp_earned_today. Confirmed backend DOES store xp_earned_today in daily_logs (line 995) but the daily endpoint (line 1072) does not appear to return it based on grep. Main agent should verify /api/progress/daily returns xp_earned_today field for consistency.

SettingsPage.js LightModeToggle (line 533): initializes from localStorage synchronously — good. Runs useEffect to add/remove html.light-mode class — good. Consider also applying the class in App.js on initial mount before SettingsPage renders so light mode styles apply on all routes from first paint (main agent notes this is done per review_request 'App.js: Light mode localStorage restore on load' — verified working since class survives across route changes).

Index.css still contains many .glow-* classes (pulse-glow, flame-glow, level-badge-glow, glow-purple, hover-glow). The spec said 'remove all glow effects from cards' — card-level glows appear neutralized (body bg deep dark verified), but animations/classes remain in stylesheet. Not a bug if cards no longer use these classes; main agent should confirm no .glow-effect is applied to card components in HomePage/Level/Shop.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V5 complete: Progress is now a standalone 2nd nav tab for both modes (Game: Home/Progress/Level/Shop/Settings, Focus: Home/Progress/Settings). ProgressPage has data-testid=progress-page, range-{daily,weekly,monthly}, stat-cards with stat-{gems-earned,xp-earned,tasks-done}, chart-toolbar with chart-{bar,pie,line,area,column}, progress-chart container. Light mode: data-testid=light-mode-toggle and light-mode-switch; localStorage key 'lightMode'; adds '.light-mode' class to html element. Backend /api/progress/monthly is live. --color-bg #06080F confirmed. Minor note: /api/progress/daily may not return xp_earned_today field — verify if XP Earned stat on Daily range shows real values.
